zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Walford於大約1565年出生在英國英格蘭艾可沃爾坦時，他的父親William Wofford29歲，母親Alice Jones27歲。他於1588年與Margaret Carter在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾帕廷加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1628年9月25日在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Walford于大约1565年出生在英国英格兰艾可沃爾坦时，他的父亲William Wofford29岁，母亲Alice Jones27岁。他于1588年与Margaret Carter在英国英格兰斯塔福爾帕廷加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1628年9月25日在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of several places so named, such as Walford (Herefordshire), Walford in Leintwardine (also Herefordshire), Walford in Baschurch (Shropshire), and possibly Walford Hall in Hampton in Arden (Warwickshire), though this last may be a manorial placename deriving from the surname. The Herefordshire placenames probably derive from Old English walh ‘foreigner, Welshman’ (genitive plural wala) + ford ‘ford’. The Shropshire placename derives from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + ford. If it does not derive from the surname, the Warwickshire placename probably has the same etymology as the Herefordshire placenames.
perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Walford in Wimborne Minster (Dorset). The placename probably derives from Old English walt ‘unsteady’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Walford was born about 1565, in Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Wofford, was 29 and his mother, Alice Jones, was 27. He married Margaret Carter in 1588, in Pattingham, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 25 September 1628, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Walford est né environ 1565, à Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Wofford, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Jones, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Carter en 1588, à Pattingham, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1628, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Walford um 1565 in Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wofford 29 und seine Mutter Alice Jones 27. Er hat 1588 in Pattingham, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Carter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. September 1628 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Walford è nato il circa 1565 nel Waltham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Wofford, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice Jones, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Carter nel 1588, nel Pattingham, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 settembre 1628, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Walfordが約1565年にイギリスイギリスエセックスワルサムで生まれた時，父William Woffordは29歳，母Alice Jonesは27歳であった。1588年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアプアッティンガムでMargaret Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1628年9月25日に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Walford(이)가 대략 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wofford(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Jones(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 패틴그함에서 Margaret Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1628년 9월 25일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Walford nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Wofford, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Jones, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Carter em 1588, em Pattingham, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1628, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Walford родился около 1565 г. в местности валтам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Wofford было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Jones, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Carter в 1588 г. в местности паттингхам, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 сентября 1628 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Walford nació aproximadamente 1565, en Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Wofford, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Jones, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Carter en 1588, en Pattingham, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1628, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
